texto: Remember to have courage, that is one of the few things that no one can ever take away from you.

texto: My most educated analysis, with all means of science and technology in mind, is that it’s magic,” Alex said. “There’s no other possible explanation!” -Alex Bailey, The Land of Stories; The Wishing Spell
